data.title: Gary Gensler Issues Altcoin Warning, Says Memecoins and ‘Sentiment Tokens’ Likely To Lose Public’s Interest
data.description:
The former Chair of the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Gary Gensler is warning that the future of non-Bitcoin (BTC) crypto assets is looking bleak
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/16/gary-gensler-issues-altcoin-warning-says-memecoins-and-sentiment-tokens-likely-to-lose-publics-interest/

data.title: Tether and Coinbase Among Largest Centralized Finance (CeFi) Lenders in Crypto, According to Galaxy Analyst
data.description:
Stablecoin issuer Tether is the largest centralized finance lender (CeFi) in the digital asset space, according to new analysis. Zack Pokorny, a research analyst at the crypto investment giant Galaxy Digital, notes that Galaxy and the Bitcoin (BTC) lending firm Ledn were the second and third-largest lenders, respectively.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/16/tether-and-coinbase-among-largest-centralized-finance-cefi-lenders-in-crypto-according-to-galaxy-analyst/

data.title:
$BTC Still trading at roughly the same place as it did during this update last month.

Strong demand for home loans in the eurozone, EU housing prices rise
data.description:
Net demand for new home loans continues to grow across the eurozone, according to the latest data released by Europe’s monetary authority. The strong increase, attributed to easing credit requirements and lower interest rates, comes against the backdrop of rising house prices and rents in the EU. Euro area demand for housing loans increases Net […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/strong-demand-for-home-loans-in-the-eurozone-eu-housing-prices-rise/

data.title: Bitdeer Switches from Selling Mining Rigs to Mining BTC, Cites Bitcoin Halving, Low Hashrate, 30% Price Drop
data.description:
Bitdeer Technologies Group, a publicly listed company, is preparing to mine for Bitcoin.
source: https://zycrypto.com/bitdeer-switches-from-selling-mining-rigs-to-mining-btc-cites-bitcoin-halving-low-hashrate-30-price-drop/

data.title: Bybit to end multiple Web3 services in strategic pivot
data.description:
Crypto exchange Bybit announced that it will discontinue a wide range of its Wweb3 products and services by the end of May, according to an April 16 notice. The exchange said the decision is part of a shift in its operational focus as it enters a new phase of growth and innovation.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bybit-to-end-multiple-web3-services-in-strategic-pivot/

data.title: Fed's Powell reasserts support for stablecoin legislation
data.description:
As digital assets gain mainstream adoption, establishing a legal framework for stablecoins is a “good idea,” said US Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. In an April 16 panel at the Economic Club of Chicago, Powell commented on the evolution of the cryptocurrency industry, which has delivered a consumer use case that “could have wide appeal” following a difficult “wave of failures and frauds,” he said. Powell delivers remarks at the Economic Club of Chicago
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/fed-powell-reasserts-support-stablecoin-legislation?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fed Chair Powell Says Crypto And Banking Rules Will 'Loosen' As Sector Matures
data.description:
Fed Chair Powell signals loosening of regulations on crypto and stablecoins, citing need for clear framework. Industry welcomes shift in tone. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/04/44850021/fed-chair-powell-says-crypto-and-banking-rules-will-loosen-as-sector-matures?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Trump Ethereum DeFi Project Gets Another Big Investment
data.description:
Dubai-based DWF Labs has purchased $25 million in WLFI, the native token of the Trump family-backed World Liberty Financial.
source: https://decrypt.co/315093/trump-ethereum-defi-project-big-investment

data.title: Crypto Prices Could Recover In Mid-To-Late 2025, Says Coinbase
data.description:
A new report from Coinbase Institutional suggests the crypto prices have entered a bear market phase. Potential recovery is not expected until mid-to-late Q2 2025.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/16/crypto-prices-could-recover-in-mid-to-late-2025-says-coinbase/
